_comment: Scripted intents for SpeakNow — covers common situations so the demo works without a live LLM. Matched on lowercased substring; falls back to catalog search.

starter_chips: A guest is vegan — what can I make?
Got a headache and we're out of coffee
Birthday party for 12 adults this weekend
Movie night with friends — need snacks

intents.reply: Got it — Spaghetti Carbonara for 6. I scaled the recipe 3× and added everything you don't already have. Pancetta, parmesan and eggs are the essentials; you're out of parmesan and eggs, so those are in.
One vegan guest? Ratatouille works for the whole table — naturally vegan, nut-free, and pairs with your pasta night. I filtered out anything with dairy or egg and pulled the fresh veg you'll need.
intents.dietary_note: Vegan ✓ · Nut-free ✓ — safe for everyone tonight

intents.reply: Hope you feel better soon! I put together a sick-day kit — paracetamol for the headache, ORS to keep hydrated, soup for comfort, and your usual coffee to get through the day.
High-protein dinner for two: grilled chicken with paneer and a quick salad. ~45g protein a plate, on your doorstep in minutes.
Birthday party bundle coming up! I added a cake, balloons, chips, soft drinks, and chocolates — everything for a great celebration. Tap to add them all.
Movie night sorted! I got popcorn, chips, Coke, chocolates, and ice cream — the perfect couch companion bundle.
I feel you! Grabbed your coffee beans (you're due for a reorder), some energy drink, and dark chocolate for a quick pick-me-up.

speaknow.fallback_reply: Here's what I found for that — tap to add anything you need.
